channel.title: Blue Bridge Cup on Kun's Music Box
channel.description: Recent content in Blue Bridge Cup on Kun's Music Box

item.title: Blue Bridge Cup MCU Column - Competition Preparation Guide
item.description:
Column Introduction

This column is a collection of preparation materials for the Blue Bridge Cup MCU Design and Development Competition, based on the CT107D development board (IAP15F2K61S2 MCU).

The content covers the following modules:

Basic Modules

  • LED control
  • Independent buttons & matrix keyboard
  • Digital tube display (static/dynamic)
  • Timer & interrupt system

Extended Modules

  • DS1302 Real-time clock
  • DS18B20 Temperature sensor
  • PCF8591 ADC/DAC
  • AT24C02 EEPROM storage
  • Ultrasonic ranging module
  • NE555 Frequency measurement

Comprehensive Practice

  • UART serial communication
  • PWM output control
  • Past provincial/national exam analysis
  • Competition code templates & tips

Continuously updated, stay tuned!
